expectations.text: Hero contains an animated bakery visual (rising bread, steam, flying pastries)
expectations.evidence: SVG bread loaf with @keyframes breathe; steam elements with @keyframes rise; flying pastry emoji with @keyframes flyout; sparkles with @keyframes twinkle

expectations.text: Uses warm amber/golden accent color appropriate for food/bakery
expectations.evidence: #f59e0b amber used for logo, buttons, stat numbers, eyebrow, borders

expectations.text: Hero headline is 10 words or fewer
expectations.evidence: 'Real Bread. Real Crust. At Your Door.' = 7 words

expectations.text: Headline is specific to sourdough, not generic
expectations.evidence: Subheadline specifies sourdough, loaves, pastries, pizza dough; no generic 'best bakery' language

expectations.text: Stats section with at least 3 numbers
Product grid with at least 4 cards
expectations.evidence: 6 product cards with emoji, Playfair Display h3, description

expectations.text: Final CTA/delivery section with form and button
expectations.evidence: cta-section with email input and 'Order This Morning's Bake' button

expectations.text: Copy mentions Portland for local identity
expectations.evidence: Eyebrow: 'Portland's Sourdough'; footer: 'Portland, OR'; CTA subtext: 'across Portland'
@keyframes breathe, rise, flyout, twinkle all defined and applied
